title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Paytm Money - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Paytm Money - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Paytm Money are looking for an experienced Risk Analyst based out of Madurai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Paytm Money:
Paytm Money is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Paytm Money!
